pr.title: Record: 0.0881 BPB — 11L Int5 GPTQ + Order-12 N-gram + Phrase Cache + 65K Chunks

output.summary: 11L Int5 GPTQ model pairs full Hessian quantization with order-12 backoff n-gram and phrase caches, adaptive alpha, and 65K chunks to meet eval limits.
techniques: Order-12 backoff n-gram + phrase cache with entropy-adaptive alpha
Full Hessian GPTQ int5 quantization with LZMA compression
65K token chunks with temperature sharpening to stay within eval budget
